## Human-Approved Scope Card

AI tutoring, student learning, feedback quality, causal identification, and heterogeneous treatment effects.

## Nearest-Neighbor Matrix

The closest paper estimates AI tutoring effects but does not identify whether feedback quality mediates student learning.

## Already-Done Memo

Prior work overlaps on tutoring outcomes; the proposed mechanism and identification contrast remain unresolved.
